blocker_register.blocker_data_source: Case law corpus with stable court/case citation identifiers and judgments metadata.
blocker_register.notes: Judgment support exists, but not the authoritative citation layer.

blocker_register.blocker_data_source: Versioned legislation source texts with stable public URIs and section-level anchors.
blocker_register.notes: This is the primary legislative identifier layer missing from the repo.

blocker_register.blocker_data_source: Document-level metadata for versioned legislation and reusable ELI descriptors.
blocker_register.notes: Needs the same source inventory as ELI plus document-level metadata alignment.

blocker_register.blocker_data_source: EuroVoc SKOS thesaurus and a NZ policy-domain crosswalk.
blocker_register.notes: No controlled policy-domain thesaurus is wired into the repo yet.

blocker_register.blocker_data_source: Versioned work/expression/version inventory for Acts, Bills, debates, and judgments.
blocker_register.notes: Metadata hooks exist, but the repository still needs a fuller source inventory.

blocker_register.blocker_data_source: Temporal concept inventory for commencement, repeal, versioning, and amendment chronology.
blocker_register.notes: Temporal metadata is present in hooks, but not yet a full ontology layer.

blocker_register.blocker_data_source: Authoritative entity-to-QID mapping for acts, members, parties, electorates, and courts.
blocker_register.notes: Local ontology mapping exists, but the entity inventory is not yet exhaustive.

blocker_register.blocker_data_source: Complete legislation publication metadata model with stable landing-page fields.
blocker_register.notes: The repo exports JSON-LD, but the schema.org legislation profile is not complete.

blocker_register.blocker_data_source: Normalized deontic and legal-effect annotation corpus.
blocker_register.notes: The repo captures legal effects, but the ontology is still only inspired by LKIF.

blocker_register.blocker_data_source: Time interval and effective-date inventory for legal sources and parameters.
blocker_register.notes: Time semantics are present as hooks, not as a complete model.

blocker_register.blocker_data_source: Temporal annotation corpus for commencement, repeal, and assessment periods.
blocker_register.notes: Temporal extraction exists, but the annotation coverage is still partial.

blocker_register.blocker_data_source: Dataset catalogue model for corpus, artefact, and package publication.
blocker_register.notes: Needed for publication-quality dataset discovery.

blocker_register.blocker_data_source: Profiled catalogue metadata aligned with DCAT-AP publication practices.
blocker_register.notes: Would support a more standards-based publication layer.

blocker_register.blocker_data_source: Actor, office, mandate, and organization graph model for parliamentary data.
blocker_register.notes: Helpful for political actor graphs, but not yet implemented.

blocker_register.blocker_data_source: Local controlled vocabulary model for policy domains and provision classification.
blocker_register.notes: SKOS is the missing substrate for controlled vocabularies here.

blocker_register.blocker_data_source: Organization hierarchy and role model for parliamentary and policy institutions.
blocker_register.notes: Would strengthen the actor and institution layer.

blocker_register.blocker_data_source: Field-level legislation profile and canonical section-level metadata mapping.
blocker_register.notes: The Legislation subtype is not fully modelled yet.

blocker_register.blocker_data_source: Formal semantics for obligations, permissions, prohibitions, powers, exceptions, and defeasibility.
blocker_register.notes: This is the complete normative semantics layer that remains open.

blocker_register.blocker_data_source: Complete rule semantics model with obligations, permissions, prohibitions, powers, and exceptions.
blocker_register.notes: Needs the full semantics layer rather than only hook points.

blocker_register.blocker_data_source: Crosswalk of entities, variables, parameters, formulas, and assessment periods.
blocker_register.notes: This is the explicit ontology bridge required for rules-as-code tooling.

blocker_register.blocker_data_source: Executable rule translation examples and validated clause-to-rule mappings.
blocker_register.notes: The repo exposes Catala hooks, but the translation path is not yet complete.

blocker_register.blocker_data_source: Rule serialization and validation pipeline for full formal norm semantics.
blocker_register.notes: The repo has LegalRuleML hooks, but not a full standards implementation.

blocker_register.blocker_data_source: Variable, parameter, and entity inventory with time-varying parameter histories.
blocker_register.notes: The repo is adjacent to OpenFisca concepts, but does not yet expose a formal ontology bridge.

blocker_register.blocker_data_source: Policy variable and parameter inventory plus entity-period semantics.
blocker_register.notes: The repo is adjacent to PolicyEngine concepts, but not yet formalised.
